data.name: Sally's Dungeon
data.detailed_description:
Sally's Dungeon is the next instalment in the Darkworldes series. Salomé and Skaadi compete to vanquish the most enemies and earn the prestigious title of General from their beloved Wielder.

A humorous, fast-paced story matches fast-paced gameplay. Level up your girls, unlock new spells, arenas and story as you progress. Create unique builds every run while you search out secret, powerful Fusions between spells and items.
data.about_the_game:
Sally's Dungeon is the next instalment in the Darkworldes series. Salomé and Skaadi compete to vanquish the most enemies and earn the prestigious title of General from their beloved Wielder.

A humorous, fast-paced story matches fast-paced gameplay. Level up your girls, unlock new spells, arenas and story as you progress. Create unique builds every run while you search out secret, powerful Fusions between spells and items.
data.short_description: Boobs and bullets! Who could ask for more? Sally's Dungeon is an arena survival game. Defeat waves of enemies and titanic women lest you be crushed beneath their titanic tits.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Intel Pentium Gold 6500Y
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 615
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
